title: modeldeployment chart values
description: Schema for charts/modeldeployment. Validates the per-InferenceSet inputs whose misconfiguration is surfaced by the modeldeployment-level schema reasons in the end-to-end error-handling proposal (e.g. inferencesetScalingMisconfigured). Cross-field guards that JSON Schema cannot express on its own (notably maxReplicas >= replicas) are additionally enforced by a fail-fast Helm template guard at render time.

name.description: Deployment / InferenceSet name. Empty falls back to .Release.Name.

namespace.description: Target workload namespace. Empty falls back to .Release.Namespace.

model.description: Inference preset name set on the InferenceSet. MUST be non-empty.

presetImage.description: Optional preset image override passed via presetOptions.image.

modelAccessSecret.description: Optional Hugging Face access token Secret name passed via presetOptions.modelAccessSecret.

instanceType.description: VM instance type used for the underlying GPU nodes.

nodeCount.description: Node count limit for the InferenceSet.

replicas.description: Desired number of InferenceSet replicas. MUST be at least 1.

enableScaling.description: Toggles KAITO ScaledObject auto-provisioning. When false, maxReplicas and scalingThreshold are ignored.

maxReplicas.description: Upper bound for autoscaling. Only used when enableScaling is true. MUST be at least 1; the Helm template additionally enforces maxReplicas >= replicas when enableScaling is true.

scalingThreshold.description: Queue-depth threshold used by the ScaledObject. Only used when enableScaling is true. MUST be positive.

gatewayName.description: Gateway the HTTPRoute attaches to. Empty derives '<namespace>-gw'.

modelServerPort.description: Port exposed by the inference (model server) pods.

extProcPort.description: EPP gRPC ext_proc port consumed by the Gateway.
